channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download PrivaZer Pro Donors 4.0.120.1

item.title: Download HEU KMS Activator 63.3.3
item.description: HEU KMS Activator is a quick Windows and Office activator with multiple methods like Digital License, KMS38, OEM and KMS. This tool takes advantage of building a KMS server inside your system, so it can easily activate both Windows and Office. In addition, it also supports Windows backup and restore, Change MS Office Edition, Key setting manually in case you purchased the original Key and more. Features of HEU KMS Activator Digital Trigger & KMS Office uninstallation...

item.title: Download QTranslate 1.0.0.0
item.description: Questsoft's original QTranslate application used to be the best translation tool on Windows desktops — until development stopped, the API broke, and users were left with a dead application. This is a complete rewrite in Kotlin with one core design change: everything is plugin-based. The translation engine, OCR, TTS, spell check, dictionary — all are separate JAR files that you install at runtime. When a service changes its API or stops working, you simply replace the plugin. The...

item.title: Download LINQPad Premium 9.7.13
item.description: LINQPad is a software utility targeting .NET Framework and .NET Core development. It is used to interactively query SQL databases using LINQ, as well as to write C# code interactively without an IDE. LINQPad will be where C# code can be rapidly prototyped outside of Visual Studio. It can also be used to code in VB.NET, SQL and F#. With LINQPad, you can interactively query databases using a modern query language: LINQ. LINQPad includes a tool optimized for on-the-fly context creation of...

item.title: Download Awesome Miner Ultimate 11.5.1
item.description: Awesome Miner is a software application designed to manage and monitor cryptocurrency mining operations. It supports a wide variety of mining hardware, including ASICs and GPUs, and can be used to manage mining for a variety of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin. Powerful tool to manage and monitor cryptocurrency mining activities. With support for a wide variety of mining hardware and cryptocurrencies, mobile apps, and customizable alerting and performance...

item.title: Download Revive Faces 2.0.14
item.description: Have you ever looked at an old photo or video and wished you could see those faces clearly again? Time, blurriness, and pixels shouldn't steal the smiles, glances, or stories of the people you love. With Revive Faces, our breakthrough AI-powered restoration software, blurry, smudged, and pixelated faces can now shine with stunning clarity—as if they were taken yesterday. Why Restore Faces? See the unseen again – Our advanced AI not only sharpens images, but also recreates lost...

item.title: Download Scale Photo Up 2.0.14
item.description: Are you tired of low-resolution, pixelated footage that stifles your creativity? Say goodbye to grainy memories and say hello to Scale Photo Up – groundbreaking AI software that doubles resolution, enhances detail, and smooths out imperfections in your photos and videos with stunning clarity! Why Scale Photo Up? Upscale 2x – No loss of quality! – Turn blurry, low-resolution photos and videos into sharp, high-resolution masterpieces. Perfect for breathing new life into old...

item.title: Download Xreveal Pro 2.9.2
item.description: Xreveal Pro is a Windows-based application similar to AnyDVD that automatically removes restrictions on DVD and Blu-ray discs. Xreveal works in the background to automatically and transparently allow access to read the contents of a DVD or Blu-ray movie disc as soon as it is inserted into the drive. The DVD/Blu-ray disc will be usable on the Windows operating system and all the programs on your computer, such as DVD/Blu-ray backup software like CloneDVD, CloneBD and others, which then...

item.title: Download Proxyman 3.7.0
item.description: Record HTTP in just a few clicks. Best-in-class Windows application that records, decodes, and simulates your HTTP requests/responses with powerful debugging tools. The application acts as a web debugging proxy, allowing users to debug network traffic from web browsers and devices like iOS and Android. Proxyman supports features like SSL proxy, filter options, JSON syntax highlighting, breakpoint tools, and the ability to edit and repeat requests. Features of Proxyman Modern Windows...

item.description: K-Lite Codec Pack Update is the update of the set of codecs and related tools. Codec stands for Compressor-decompressor.
